name: Gagaga Utopic Tactics
name_jp: ガガガ・ホープ・タクティクス
desc: "Utopia" and "Utopic" Xyz Monsters you control whose original Attribute is LIGHT cannot be destroyed by card effects, also your opponent cannot target them with card effects. You can only use each of the following effects of "Gagaga Utopic Tactics" once per turn. You can declare a Level from 1 to 12, then target 2 face-up monsters you control, including a "Gagaga" monster; they become that Level. If you Xyz Summon a "Utopia" or "Utopic" Xyz Monster whose original Attribute is LIGHT: You can target 1 card your opponent controls; destroy it.
eff: "Utopia" and "Utopic" Xyz Monsters you control whose original Attribute is LIGHT cannot be destroyed by card effects, also your opponent cannot target them with card effects. You can only use each of the following effects of "Gagaga Utopic Tactics" once per turn. You can declare a Level from 1 to 12, then target 2 face-up monsters you control, including a "Gagaga" monster; they become that Level. If you Xyz Summon a "Utopia" or "Utopic" Xyz Monster whose original Attribute is LIGHT: You can target 1 card your opponent controls; destroy it.

mst: Prevents other cards being destroyed by card effects
Prevents other cards being targeted by card effects
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
